title: Milestone 1: Trusted workflow contracts
summary: Unify native plan-node, coordination-task, session-state, and schema-surface behavior so agents do not need to care which workflow shape is active. Fold in the live friction where repo guidance implied a `prism_session` inspect hop that the server does not actually support.

acceptance.label: The same validation and completion flow succeeds for coordination tasks and native plan nodes.
Schema examples, tool schemas, and live behavior agree for prism_session and high-value prism_mutate paths.
Session and workflow diagnostics clearly explain which workflow unit is active and what action is supported next.
